overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long XPEV Daily ETF (XPEG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of XPeng Inc. (NYSE: XPEV) stock, less fees, and expenses XPEG was launched on Jan 15, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
